summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Softogram website redesign features. All major redesign objectives successfully implemented: new logo with code brackets and signal wave, fixed navbar, Instagram/Facebook social integration, and premium responsive footer design.

configuration_notes.impact: Email notifications won't be sent but contact form submissions work perfectly

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (11/11 tests passed - 100% success rate)
New logo with code brackets <> and signal wave design renders correctly
Logo 'gram' text displays cyan-to-violet gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 to-violet-500)
Navbar 'Start Project' button fully visible and properly positioned (not cut off)
Navbar shows exactly 4 items: Services, Pricing, Work, Contact
Mobile menu button appears correctly on smaller screens (hidden on xl+ screens)
Footer redesigned with 4-column responsive grid layout
Footer Brand section (5-column span) with logo, tagline 'Your idea. Our code. Delivered.'
Footer Company section with 5 links: Home, Services, Case Studies, Portfolio, Contact
Footer Legal section with 4 policy links: Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Refund Policy, Cookie Policy
Footer Contact section with email (support@softogram.com), phone (+91-6393783010), location (Uttar Pradesh, India)
Footer social media integration: LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, Instagram, Facebook (5 total icons)
Instagram social icon present and working
Facebook social icon present and working
Contact form integration working with success toast notification
Contact form clears after successful submission
Privacy Policy page accessible and properly styled
Terms & Conditions page accessible and properly styled
Refund Policy page accessible and properly styled
Cookie Policy page accessible and properly styled
Mobile responsive design working (tested on 390x844, 768x1024, 1920x1080)
Desktop navbar maintains visibility on tablet screens
Footer responsive behavior on mobile devices
